text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Guess what, Trainer?! I've got myself a<n>new fan! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
She's still just a little girl, but as soon as<n>she saw
me singing downtown, she said<n>she fell in love!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And you know what? She was even<n>wearing
ribbons that matched mine!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe in a few years, we can even be in<n>an idol
group together? Yeah! Let's<n>make that happen!
